sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me understand the structure. There are blocks arranged in a grid-like pattern. Let me map the positions and colors of all 4x4 blocks.

seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
blocks = []
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] == 16:
        b = n['boundary']
        center_r = (b[0][0] + b[2][0]) // 2
        center_c = (b[0][1] + b[2][1]) // 2
        blocks.append((center_r, center_c, n['color']))
blocks.sort()
for r, c, color in blocks:
    print("  (%d, %d): %s" % (r, c, color))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
